developer_bio: I'm a Full-Stack developer and 3D modeler making YouTube videos to help developers and beginners
developer_bio_with_br: I'm a Full-Stack developer and 3D modeler making <0/> digital content to help developers and beginners
about_me_text: I am a skilled web developer with solid experience in PHP, MySQL, and JavaScript. As an expert in the modern ecosystem, I use libraries such as React and Three.js, the Node.js runtime environment, and the Angular framework. I am currently deepening my knowledge of Next.js for high-performance applications and Docker for containerization and scalability. I work closely with clients to create efficient and intuitive solutions. Let's bring your ideas to life!
